TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jerome_Anderson, title = Jerome_Anderson, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jerome_Anderson} }

S.FORM: Jerome Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 10, Wilt Chamberlain, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jerome Anderson sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 10, Wilt Chamberlain, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2009) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *erome an*ers~ɕon s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, wilt ʦ~ʨħamβerlain, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
